personal.name: Sandeep Khemani
taglines: ASP.NET Developer building reliable ERP and CRM platforms
C# and SQL Server specialist for business-critical workflows
REST API and payment gateway integrator for enterprise systems
Developer focused on clean code, usability, and measurable impact
personal.summary: ASP.NET Developer with hands-on experience designing and delivering CRM, ERP, and workforce management applications for education and operations teams. Skilled in C#, ASP.NET Web Forms, SQL Server, MySQL, RESTful APIs, ASMX web services, token-based authentication, and payment gateway integrations. Known for improving system usability, resolving critical production issues, and building scalable enterprise modules that support high-volume daily workflows.
highlights: Developed and enhanced ERP modules across fee management, timetable, attendance, report cards, payroll, leave management, and support ticketing.
Migrated legacy ASMX web services to secure token-based REST APIs to improve maintainability, security, and inter-service communication.
Integrated and maintained GrayQuest, CCAvenue, and NTT Data payment gateways for secure and accurate transaction processing.
Created analytical reports and dashboards that improved operational visibility for school administrators, branch managers, and support teams.

skills.description: Core implementation skills for enterprise web applications.
Daily tools used across ASP.NET, API testing, and mobile-connected systems.
Data modeling, secure integration, and enterprise workflow architecture.
Domain experience that helps translate business operations into usable software.

experience.title: ASP.NET Developer
experience.summary: Developing and enhancing ERP, employee management, and CRM modules used across education and workforce operations.

systems.name: eSchoolApp - ERP Solution
points: Developed fee management modules, including a fee concession maker-checker workflow supporting Admin and Non-Admin roles.
Built and maintained Fee Management, Timetable, Attendance, and Report Card modules with usability-focused enhancements.
Resolved production issues across modules, improving application stability and reducing user-reported incidents.
Integrated GrayQuest, CCAvenue, and NTT Data payment gateways for secure and uninterrupted transaction processing.
Developed monthly analytical reports to support management visibility and decision-making.

systems.name: Shramdoot App - Employee Management System
points: Engineered shift management, attendance tracking, payroll processing, leave management, and branch operations modules.
Migrated legacy ASMX web services to secure token-based REST APIs for stronger maintainability and service communication.
Implemented branch creation, shift assignment, salary tracking, and role-based access control features.
Built a consolidated Branch Details dashboard with employee counts, branch information, and operational metrics.

systems.name: CRM - Ticket Management System
points: Developed ticket creation, assignment, and real-time status tracking workflows to improve support response efficiency.

experience.title: Web Development Intern
experience.summary: Built ASP.NET web applications while gaining full-stack experience across front-end, back-end, and SQL Server data layers.

systems.name: ASP.NET Web Applications
points: Built web application features using ASP.NET technologies across front-end and back-end layers.
Wrote optimized SQL queries for efficient data retrieval, storage, and manipulation.
Designed normalized SQL Server schemas to support reliable and scalable data management.

projects.title: Employee Feedback System

projects.impact: Made feedback collection more structured, trackable, and accessible for employee performance review workflows.

Product management workflows for retail operations.
